caption: A person's hands are seen interacting with a "Topps" trading card box labeled "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and "2020". The box features an image of a baseball player and is being handled against a dark background. In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap is visible behind a desk, positioned next to a large "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" logo. Across the frames, the person's hands move the box, sliding a card out from the top packaging. The on-screen text includes "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC," "2020," and "JASPYS CASEBREAKS." The scene progresses from the box being held and tilted to a card being partially extracted from the sleeve. The environment appears to be a studio or dedicated space for card breaking, characterized by the branded backdrop and the presence of the individual overseeing the process.
